data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read relevant test files and SKILL.md. Confirmed: (1) test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py has 8 existing tests covering escalated section slots, agent prompts, veto, resolution agent, terminal escalation. (2) SKILL.md Step 5 (lines 384-399) has no reference to dso:red-test-writer or red-task-escalation. grep confirms neither string exists in SKILL.md. RED test will fail as required.
